content: I reported discrimination to human resources after my supervisor denied a promotion and made repeated comments about women not being fit for leadership. Two days later I was terminated.
Thank you for your patience; timeline details help us protect your claim. What exact reason was given for the housing decision, who gave it, and what date was it communicated?
I reported discrimination to human resources after my supervisor denied a promotion and made repeated comments about women not being fit for leadership. Two days later I was terminated.
Thank you for sharing this; even partial records can still help. Who witnessed the retaliation or has documents about it?
I reported discrimination to human resources after my supervisor denied a promotion and made repeated comments about women not being fit for leadership. Two days later I was terminated.
Thank you for sharing this; even partial records can still help. What written notice, grievance, informal review, hearing, or appeal rights were provided, requested, denied, or ignored?
I reported discrimination to human resources after my supervisor denied a promotion and made repeated comments about women not being fit for leadership. Two days later I was terminated.
Thank you for sharing this; even partial records can still help. When did the key events happen, including the complaint, notice, hearing or review request, and any denial or termination decision?
